personality.title: The Fearless Fireball
personality.summary: Bold, impatient, and absolutely convinced they're in charge. An Aries pet doesn't walk into a room — they own it.

soTheirSign: Sprints full speed at literally nothing, then looks at you like YOU'RE the weird one
Has to be first through every door, every time, no exceptions
Picks fights with animals three times their size and genuinely thinks they'll win
Gets bored of a new toy in approximately 4 minutes
Somehow turns every walk into an extreme sport

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.style: Physical, intense, and impossible to ignore
howTheyLove.description: An Aries pet loves you like a freight train — full speed, no brakes. They'll body-slam you with affection, follow you everywhere, and physically place themselves between you and anything they consider a threat. Their love language is presence. Aggressive, enthusiastic presence.
signs: Jumps on you the second you walk in
Brings you things (whether you want them or not)
Sleeps pressed directly against you, preferably on you

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Aries pets wilt without stimulation. They need new routes, new challenges, new things to conquer. A bored Aries is a destructive Aries. Give them a mission and they'll give you their whole heart.

personality.title: The Royal Couch Potato
personality.summary: Stubborn, food-obsessed, and deeply committed to comfort. A Taurus pet has never met a nap they didn't love.

soTheirSign: Will not move from their spot. Not for you, not for anyone, not for a fire drill
Knows the exact sound of their treat bag opening from three rooms away
Has claimed one specific cushion/bed/chair and will stare at you until you move
Takes the scenic route on walks because rushing is beneath them
Shows affection by sitting on you — all of their weight, no apology

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.style: Steady, warm, and always within arm's reach
howTheyLove.description: A Taurus pet loves through consistency. They're the one who's always there — same spot on the couch, same greeting at the door, same gentle lean against your leg when you're having a bad day. Their love isn't flashy, but it's the most reliable thing in your life.
signs: Leans their full weight against you
Follows your routine like a shadow
Brings you their favourite thing (the ultimate Taurus honour)

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Taurus pets thrive on routine. Same walk time, same feeding time, same spot on the sofa. Change stresses them out. Give them predictability and they'll give you the most steadfast companionship you've ever known.

personality.title: The Chaos Communicator
personality.summary: Noisy, curious, and never the same pet two days in a row. A Gemini pet has opinions and they WILL share them.

soTheirSign: Has a different vocal sound for every single emotion and expects you to learn them all
Can go from zoomies to dead asleep in under 30 seconds
Investigates every single bag, box, and pocket that enters the house
Learns tricks suspiciously fast, then pretends not to know them when convenient
Has genuinely tried to communicate with you using eye contact alone

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.description: A Gemini pet loves through interaction. They want to talk to you, play with you, show you things, and generally narrate their entire existence in your direction. Silence worries them. If they're making noise at you, that's love.
signs: Talks at you constantly
Brings you random objects as conversation starters
Does that head-tilt thing when you speak, like they're genuinely processing

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: A bored Gemini will redecorate your house (not in a good way). They need puzzle toys, new experiences, and someone who actually talks back to them. Engage their mind and they'll never stop making you laugh.

personality.title: The Emotional Bodyguard
personality.summary: Sensitive, clingy, and will literally absorb your emotions. A Cancer pet feels everything — especially your feelings.

soTheirSign: Can tell you're upset before you even know you're upset
Gets genuinely offended if you pay attention to another animal
Has a comfort object they cannot sleep without
Becomes a different pet entirely around strangers (shy, cautious, suspicious)
Treats your bed like sacred ground and defends it accordingly

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.description: A Cancer pet's love is the most emotionally intelligent thing you'll ever experience. They don't just sense your mood — they respond to it. Sad? They're in your lap. Anxious? They're pressed against you. Happy? They mirror it right back. It's like living with a furry therapist.
signs: Appears out of nowhere when you're crying
Tucks themselves into the smallest space next to you
Guards you while you sleep

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Cancer pets need to feel secure. Loud voices, chaos, and unpredictability stress them deeply. Give them a calm, loving home and they'll be the most devoted companion you could imagine.

personality.title: The Main Character
personality.summary: Dramatic, generous, and fully aware of how good they look. A Leo pet doesn't want your attention — they require it.

soTheirSign: Has an actual signature pose they strike when they know you're watching
Will sulk — visibly, dramatically — if they feel ignored
Positions themselves in the exact centre of any room, group, or photo
Greets guests like a celebrity greeting fans
Has never once been subtle about anything in their entire life

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.style: Grand, warm, and impossible to miss
howTheyLove.description: A Leo pet loves you like you're their favourite person in the world (because you are, and they need you to know it). Their affection is big, warm, and public. They'll show off for you, protect you, and make you feel like the most important human alive.
signs: Performs for you — tricks, rolls, zoomies — and looks for applause
Puts their paw on you possessively when others are around
Literally beams when you praise them

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Leo pets need to feel special. Tell them they're beautiful. Praise them when they do literally anything. A Leo who feels seen is the most loyal, generous, joyful companion alive. A Leo who feels ignored will make sure you regret it.

personality.title: The Perfectionist Angel
personality.summary: Clean, observant, and quietly judging you. A Virgo pet has standards — and you may or may not be meeting them.

soTheirSign: Stares at you with an expression that clearly says 'I would have done that differently'
Has very specific preferences about food, sleeping position, and walking route — and will not compromise
Grooms themselves obsessively and looks personally offended when they get dirty
Notices every tiny change in the house and investigates it thoroughly
Brings you things they think you need (shoes, blankets, their lead at walk time)

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.style: Quiet, practical, and shown through actions
howTheyLove.description: A Virgo pet won't smother you with affection — they'll show love through service. They fetch your slippers. They alert you to the postman. They herd the children. Their love is useful, practical, and always paying attention to what you need before you ask.
signs: Checks on you throughout the day
Brings you things without being asked
Waits patiently while you're busy, then appears the second you're free

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Virgo pets need purpose. They want to be helpful. Give them tasks, training, and structure and they'll be the most dependable companion you've ever had. Without purpose, they get anxious.

personality.title: The Social Diplomat
personality.summary: Charming, indecisive, and deeply committed to keeping the peace. A Libra pet wants everyone to get along — especially with them.

soTheirSign: Freezes with genuine anxiety when two people in the house are arguing
Is friends with literally every animal and human they've ever met
Cannot choose between two toys and will sit staring at both for an unreasonable amount of time
Has perfected the art of looking adorable to get out of trouble
Physically positions themselves between people to maintain group harmony

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.style: Gentle, balanced, and always seeking closeness
howTheyLove.description: A Libra pet loves through togetherness. They don't need to be ON you — just near you. Same room, same sofa, same vibe. They're the pet who matches your energy perfectly, calms down when you're calm, and perks up when you do. They're your emotional mirror.
signs: Always in the same room as you, never the centre of attention but always present
Rests their head on you gently
Looks at you with an expression that says 'we're a team'

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Libra pets cannot handle being alone. They need company — yours, another pet's, anyone's. Loneliness genuinely distresses them. If you can give them partnership, they'll give you the most harmonious relationship of your life.

personality.title: The Intense One
personality.summary: Loyal, secretive, and watching you with an intensity that borders on unsettling. A Scorpio pet has depths you'll never fully understand.

soTheirSign: Stares at you with an intensity that makes you wonder what they know
Has a hiding spot you've never found and will never find
Holds grudges. Actually holds grudges. You'll know when you're forgiven
Bonds with one person so deeply it's almost unsettling to everyone else
Has 100% caught you doing something embarrassing and you can see it in their eyes

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.style: Fiercely, exclusively, and with their entire soul
howTheyLove.description: When a Scorpio pet loves you, you become their entire world. It's not casual. It's not shared easily. They chose you, and that choice is permanent. Their loyalty is almost frightening in its intensity — they would genuinely do anything for you.
signs: Follows you and only you
Gets visibly jealous when you give attention elsewhere
Watches over you while you sleep like a tiny, furry guardian

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Scorpio pets need to know they're safe with you. Betrayal (rehoming threats, harsh discipline, inconsistency) breaks something in them that's hard to repair. Earn their trust and you'll have the most devoted companion alive.

personality.title: The Happy Wanderer
personality.summary: Adventurous, clumsy, and pathologically optimistic. A Sagittarius pet treats every day like the best day of their life.

soTheirSign: Has escaped from the garden/house/lead at least once and came back like nothing happened
Gets genuinely excited about things that have happened every single day of their life (walks, dinner, you coming home)
Crashes into furniture with zero shame or learning curve
Makes friends with strangers faster than you do
Cannot be contained, restrained, or convinced to stay still for a photo

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.description: A Sagittarius pet loves like every reunion is the best moment of their life. They bring pure, unfiltered joy to everything. Their love isn't complicated — it's just big, happy, and constant. Being loved by a Sag pet is like having a personal cheerleader who thinks you're the greatest thing that's ever existed.
signs: Full-body wiggles when they see you
Brings you outdoor treasures (sticks, leaves, things you'd rather not identify)
Wants to go everywhere with you, always

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Sagittarius pets need space to explore. Keeping them cooped up is like caging a bird. Give them long walks, new places, and off-lead time when safe. Their spirit needs room to run.

personality.title: The Old Soul
personality.summary: Dignified, patient, and suspiciously wise. A Capricorn pet has the energy of a retired professor who's seen it all.

soTheirSign: Looked like an old man even as a baby
Judges other animals' behaviour with visible disapproval
Has a daily routine they invented themselves and gets annoyed when you disrupt it
Sits with a posture that suggests they're about to deliver a TED talk
Earned your trust slowly, deliberately, and on their own terms

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.style: Quiet, steady, and earned over time
howTheyLove.description: A Capricorn pet doesn't give love away freely. You earn it. But once earned, it's the most solid, dependable love you'll ever know. They won't smother you — they'll simply always be there. Every morning, every evening, same spot, same quiet devotion. It's love built to last.
signs: Sits near you in comfortable silence
Checks on you with a single look, then goes back to their business
Chooses you over food (the highest Capricorn honour)

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Capricorn pets need to be treated with dignity. Don't baby-talk them. Don't dress them up (unless they initiate it). Treat them like the wise, capable being they are and they'll respect you right back.

personality.title: The Loveable Weirdo
personality.summary: Independent, eccentric, and doing things no other animal has ever thought to do. An Aquarius pet is genuinely one of a kind.

soTheirSign: Does something so bizarre on a daily basis that you've stopped questioning it
Likes people but on their own terms — comes to you when THEY decide, not when called
Has figured out how to open/reach/access something they absolutely should not have
Sleeps in positions that look physically impossible and genuinely uncomfortable
Reacts to normal situations in completely unexpected ways

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.description: An Aquarius pet won't love you the way other pets do. They'll invent their own way. Maybe it's a specific sound they only make for you. Maybe it's the way they bring you weird gifts. Maybe it's the 3am check-in where they just stare at you, confirm you're alive, and leave. It's weird. It's perfect. It's theirs.
signs: Has a unique greeting ritual they do for no one else
Shows affection at unexpected moments
Respects your space but always knows where you are

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Aquarius pets need you to let them be weird. Don't try to make them 'normal.' Celebrate the strange little rituals, the odd habits, the inexplicable preferences. The more you accept their uniqueness, the more they'll let you into their world.

personality.title: The Gentle Dreamer
personality.summary: Sensitive, intuitive, and permanently in their own little world. A Pisces pet feels everything — and forgives everything too.

soTheirSign: Stares out the window for 20 minutes at a time watching absolutely nothing
Gets their feelings hurt and you can literally see it on their face
Falls asleep in the most inconvenient places because they just drift off
Reacts to music — actually reacts, like they're feeling it
Has an uncanny ability to appear in your lap the exact moment you need comfort

howTheyLove.title: How They Show Love
howTheyLove.description: A Pisces pet doesn't just love you — they feel you. They absorb your emotions and reflect them back with compassion. Bad day? They know. They're already there, pressed against you, offering the kind of silent comfort that no human can match. Their love is the softest, most healing thing you'll ever experience.
signs: Appears when you're sad without being called
Looks at you with eyes that seem to understand everything
Gently places their head on you during quiet moments

whatTheyNeed.title: The One Thing They Need From You
whatTheyNeed.description: Pisces pets are emotionally porous — they absorb the energy around them. Harsh tones, stress, and conflict physically affect them. Give them a peaceful environment and gentle handling, and they'll be the most healing presence in your life.
